name: CSM: Slow Response Narrator
description: Narrator with cognitive difficulty who responds very slowly. Tests that silence is protected and no interrogative prompts fire.

events.content: Hello Maggie, it's so good to see you. I'm Lori, and I'm here to keep you company.
It's lovely to hear your voice, Maggie.
I... my mother used to make bread.

expected_behaviors.silence_protected: 5 minutes of silence between turns 2 and 3 — system should NOT have fired interrogative nudge
expected_behaviors.no_correction: System must not correct or contradict anything Maggie says
expected_behaviors.invitational_tone: All Lori responses must be invitational, not interrogative
